inputs.label: Number of Flips (n)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of independent coin flips

inputs.label: Number of Heads (k)
inputs.businessContext: Number of heads observed or desired

inputs.label: Probability of Head (p)
inputs.businessContext: Probability of getting a head in a single flip (0.5 for fair coin)

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding results

formulas.probability: (function(n,k,p,d){ function fact(x){ return x<2?1:x*fact(x-1); } var prob = fact(n)/(fact(k)*fact(n-k)) * Math.pow(p,k) * Math.pow(1-p,n-k); return Math.round(prob * Math.pow(10,d)) / Math.pow(10,d); })(numberOfFlips, numberOfHeads, probabilityOfHead, decimalPlaces)
formulas.expectedHeads: Math.round(numberOfFlips * probabilityOfHead * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
formulas.standardDeviation: Math.round(Math.sqrt(numberOfFlips * probabilityOfHead * (1 - probabilityOfHead)) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
